normalizationSummary: Use the multi-tool market-value pack to create educational and insight-driven templates that work inside and outside real estate.
whyNow: One of the most versatile imports because it spans PSD, Canva, Figma, AI, and EPS source formats.

candidateTemplates.name: Market Value Explainer
candidateTemplates.contentGoal: Explain how value is determined in a simple, client-facing format.
candidateTemplates.rationale: Good for advisors, brokers, consultants, and real-estate adjacent businesses.

candidateTemplates.name: Market Value Checklist
candidateTemplates.contentGoal: Turn a topic into a fast checklist or myth-vs-fact style post.
candidateTemplates.rationale: Adds a highly reusable educational format to the generalized library.
